scope_note: This panel summarizes the structured course-rigor and application-guidance notes currently exported for this school. It remains source-backed and does not infer missing requirements.

areas.name: Recommendations
areas.summary: No. All required materials (transcripts, recommendations, test scores, etc.) must be submitted electronically or via mail. All documents must be official with the exception of self-reported test scores. You may use your portal to upload an optional resume, but this is not required for admission.
areas.detail: No. All required materials (transcripts, recommendations, test scores, etc.) must be submitted electronically or via mail. All documents must be official with the exception of self-reported test scores. You may use your portal to upload an optional resume, but this is not required for admission.

areas.name: Essays
areas.summary: The Boston College Writing Supplement must be submitted along with your application to Boston College at www.commonapp.org . Please do not mail or email your essay response.
areas.detail: The Boston College Writing Supplement must be submitted along with your application to Boston College at www.commonapp.org . Please do not mail or email your essay response.
